sentences.arabic: قَرَّرْتُ هَذِهِ الْمَرَّةَ أَنْ أُسَافِرَ وَحْدِي دُونَ أَصْدِقَاءَ أَوْ عَائِلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj put sam odlučio putovati sam, bez prijatelja ili porodice.
sentences.translationEn: This time I decided to travel alone, without friends or family.

sentences.arabic: فِي الْبِدَايَةِ شَعَرْتُ بِالْوَحْدَةِ لَكِنِّي سُرْعَانَ مَا اعْتَدْتُ عَلَى ذَلِكَ.
sentences.translation: U početku sam se osjećao usamljeno, ali ubrzo sam se navikao.
sentences.translationEn: At first I felt lonely but I quickly got used to it.

sentences.arabic: كُنْتُ أَتَّخِذُ قَرَارَاتِي بِحُرِّيَّةٍ وَأَذْهَبُ أَيْنَمَا أُرِيدُ.
sentences.translation: Donosio sam odluke slobodno i odlazio kud god sam htio.
sentences.translationEn: I made my decisions freely and went wherever I wanted.

sentences.arabic: تَعَرَّفْتُ عَلَى أَشْخَاصٍ جُدُدٍ فِي كُلِّ مَكَانٍ زُرْتُهُ.
sentences.translation: Upoznavao sam nove ljude na svakom mjestu koje sam posjetio.
sentences.translationEn: I met new people at every place I visited.

sentences.arabic: اكْتَشَفْتُ أَنَّ السَّفَرَ الْمُنْفَرِدَ يُقَوِّي الشَّخْصِيَّةَ وَيُوَسِّعُ الأُفُقَ.
sentences.translation: Otkrio sam da solo putovanje jača karakter i širi vidike.
sentences.translationEn: I discovered that solo travel builds character and broadens the horizon.
